pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the migration goal.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if Java 21-specific APIs are used in the codebase.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the missing JavaFX Graphics dependency required for the application to run.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this dependency, classes from the javafx.graphics module (such as Scene, Stage, or Canvas) will result in ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the main class reference in the JavaFX Maven plugin from Main to Launcher to match the new entry point.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the JavaFX plugin would attempt to launch the non-existent or incorrect 'Main' class, resulting in a runtime error when running via the plugin.
